title: Homestead Quarter
description: A dense cluster of sleeping pods and industrial workshops.

title: Logistics Sector
description: The operational heart of the colony, leading to the deep mines.

title: Jungle Ruins
description: Bioluminescent jungle reclaiming ancient Aethel stone ruins.

title: Sector 9 Ruins
description: The ancient Aethel facility buried beneath the jungle.

title: Lower City
description: Lower Spire streets, market roofs, sewer ratlines, and safehouse routes where the heist is assembled from overlooked lives.

title: Upper City
description: Executive parks, service corridors, lounges, archives, and rooftop escape paths where politeness becomes the security system.

title: Slag Pits
description: A dangerous Foundry outskirts network of slag routes, coolant shelters, waste machinery, and airlock systems around the Astra landing site.

title: Assembly Line
description: The Foundry interior: conveyor timing, conditioning chambers, forge machinery, power-core theft, and the Titan escape route.

title: Dominion Orbital Ring
description: The Ring surface: forced-dock scars, executive luxury, false paradise, security control, and zero-g service routes.

title: Deep Ring
description: The frozen core of the Orbital Ring: server crypts, firewall infrastructure, Elara's Anchor cathedral, Vale's throne, and the breach beyond reality.

title: Event Horizon
description: A fractured realm where perception replaces physics, crew fears become walkable places, and the way forward is built from trust.

title: The Singularity
description: The final ascent through every memory the crew survived, ending at the white center where Vale tries to turn silence into salvation.

title: The Astra
description: A warm, battered ship that serves as the crew's home between missions.
